raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX I purchased what was supposed to be XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX from a company XXXX XXXX I received the XXXX and they were not XXXX products, they had no part numbers and were not as described. I reached out to the company to return the item and they agreed to send me a shipping label. I shipped the products back, 2 of the products shipped to an undeliverable vacant warehouse according to USPS tracking, and the other 2 were returned to me stating the other address was undeliverable. I reached out to XXXX and have not gotten a single response or did I receive a refund. So I disputed the charge with my credit card company, CITI, on XX/XX/XXXX. After a month of review they decided that I was held responsible for this charge, so I reopened the dispute and sent them every email, pictures and tracking information stating that both return addresses were undeliverable. I typed a letter stating exactly what happened, it is clear as day that I have truly been scammed by this company and I am now out {$360.00} and I dont even have 2 of the 4 hubs because they are still sitting at a vacant warehouse in XXXX according to usps tracking. On XX/XX/XXXX CITI has stood by their original response and stating I am held responsible for the payment. I am reaching out to you to see if I can receive assistance in this case, I have been a victim of fraud and my credit card company that I have been a loyal costumer to since XXXX is not helping me in my time of need. Thank you for your time.
